verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce autem Core filius Isaar, filii Caath, filii Levi, et Dathan atque Abiron filii Eliab, Hon quoque filius Pheleth de filiis Ruben,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֣ח קֹ֔רַח בֶּן־יִצְהָ֥ר בֶּן־קְהָ֖ת בֶּן־לֵוִ֑י וְדָתָ֨ן וַאֲבִירָ֜ם בְּנֵ֧י אֱלִיאָ֛ב וְא֥וֹן בֶּן־פֶּ֖לֶת בְּנֵ֥י רְאוּבֵֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And behold Core the son of Isaar, the son of Caath, the son of Levi, and Dathan and Abiron the sons of Eliab, and Hon the son of Pheleth of the children of Ruben,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kora Jetseharin poika, joka oli Levin pojan Kahatin poika, otti kanssansa Datanin ja Abiramin Eliabin pojat, ja Onin Peletin pojan Rubenin pojista,
verses.king_james: Now Korah, the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, and Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, and On, the son of Peleth, sons of Reuben, took men:

verses.latin_vulgate: surrexerunt contra Moysen, aliique filiorum Israël ducenti quinquaginta viri proceres synagogæ, et qui tempore concilii per nomina vocabantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּקֻ֙מוּ֙ לִפְנֵ֣י מֹשֶׁ֔ה וַאֲנָשִׁ֥ים מִבְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל חֲמִשִּׁ֣ים וּמָאתָ֑יִם נְשִׂיאֵ֥י עֵדָ֛ה קְרִאֵ֥י מוֹעֵ֖ד אַנְשֵׁי־שֵֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Rose up against Moses, and with them two hundred and fifty others of the children of Israel, leading men of the synagogue, and who in the time of assembly were called by name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he nousivat Mosesta vastaan: niin myös Israelin lapsista kaksisataa ja viisikymmentä miestä ylimmäisistä, kansalta kutsuttua, kuuluisaa miestä,
verses.king_james: And they rose up before Moses, with certain of the children of Israel, two hundred and fifty princes of the assembly, famous in the congregation, men of renown:

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque stetissent adversum Moysen et Aaron, dixerunt : Sufficiat vobis, quia omnis multitudo sanctorum est, et in ipsis est Dominus : cur elevamini super populum Domini ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽקָּהֲל֞וּ עַל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה וְעַֽל־אַהֲרֹ֗ן וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ אֲלֵהֶם֮ רַב־לָכֶם֒ כִּ֤י כׇל־הָֽעֵדָה֙ כֻּלָּ֣ם קְדֹשִׁ֔ים וּבְתוֹכָ֖ם יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמַדּ֥וּעַ תִּֽתְנַשְּׂא֖וּ עַל־קְהַ֥ל יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they had stood up against Moses and Aaron, they said: Let it be enough for you, that all the multitude consisteth of holy ones, and the Lord is among them: Why lift you up yourselves above the people of the Lord?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he kokoontuivat Mosesta ja Aaronia vastaan, ja sanoivat heille: se on teille ylen paljo; sillä kansa on kaikki pyhä, ja Herra on heidän kanssansa, ja miksi te korotatte teitänne Herran kansan päälle?
verses.king_james: And they gathered themselves together against Moses and against Aaron, and said unto them, Ye take too much upon you, seeing all the congregation are holy, every one of them, and the Lord is among them: wherefore then lift ye up yourselves above the congregation of the Lord?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum audisset Moyses, cecidit pronus in faciem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֣ע מֹשֶׁ֔ה וַיִּפֹּ֖ל עַל־פָּנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: When Moses heard this, he fell flat on his face:
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Moses sen kuuli, lankesi hän kasvoillensa,
verses.king_james: And when Moses heard it, he fell upon his face:

verses.latin_vulgate: locutusque ad Core et ad omnem multitudinem : Mane, inquit, notum faciet Dominus qui ad se pertineant, et sanctos applicabit sibi : et quos elegerit, appropinquabunt ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֨ר אֶל־קֹ֜רַח וְאֶֽל־כׇּל־עֲדָתוֹ֮ לֵאמֹר֒ בֹּ֠קֶר וְיֹדַ֨ע יְהֹוָ֧ה אֶת־אֲשֶׁר־ל֛וֹ וְאֶת־הַקָּד֖וֹשׁ וְהִקְרִ֣יב אֵלָ֑יו וְאֵ֛ת אֲשֶׁ֥ר יִבְחַר־בּ֖וֹ יַקְרִ֥יב אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And speaking to Core and all the multitude, he said: In the morning the Lord will make known who belong to him, and the holy he will join to himself: and whom he shall choose, they shall approach to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhui Koralle ja koko hänen seurallensa sanoen: huomenna Herra ilmoittaa kuka hänen omansa on, ja kuka pyhä on ja saa hänelle uhrata: jonka hän valitsee, se uhratkaan hänelle.
verses.king_james: And he spake unto Korah and unto all his company, saying, Even to morrow the Lord will shew who are his, and who is holy; and will cause him to come near unto him: even him whom he hath chosen will he cause to come near unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc igitur facite : tollat unusquisque thuribula sua, tu Core, et omne concilium tuum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֖את עֲשׂ֑וּ קְחוּ־לָכֶ֣ם מַחְתּ֔וֹת קֹ֖רַח וְכׇל־עֲדָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Do this therefore: Take every man of you your censers, thou Core, and all thy company.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tehkäät näin: ottakaat teillenne savuastiat, Kora ja kaikki hänen seuransa,
verses.king_james: This do; Take you censers, Korah, and all his company;

verses.latin_vulgate: et hausto cras igne, ponite desuper thymiama coram Domino : et quemcumque elegerit, ipse erit sanctus : multum erigimini filii Levi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּתְנ֣וּ בָהֵ֣ן ׀ אֵ֡שׁ וְשִׂ֩ימוּ֩ עֲלֵיהֶ֨ן ׀ קְטֹ֜רֶת לִפְנֵ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ מָחָ֔ר וְהָיָ֗ה הָאִ֛ישׁ אֲשֶׁר־יִבְחַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה ה֣וּא הַקָּד֑וֹשׁ רַב־לָכֶ֖ם בְּנֵ֥י לֵוִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And putting fire in them to morrow, put incense upon it before the Lord: and whomsoever he shall choose, the same shall be holy: you take too much upon you, ye sons of Levi.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pankaat niihin tulta, ja heittäkäät niihin suitsutusta Herran eteen huomenna, ja se mies, jonka Herra valitsee, olkoon pyhä: se on teille paljo, Levin lapset.
verses.king_james: And put fire therein, and put incense in them before the Lord to morrow: and it shall be that the man whom the Lord doth choose, he shall be holy: ye take too much upon you, ye sons of Levi.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque rursum ad Core : Audite, filii Levi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֖ה אֶל־קֹ֑רַח שִׁמְעוּ־נָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י לֵוִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said again to Core: Hear ye sons of Levi.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi Koralle: kuulkaat nyt Levin lapset!
verses.king_james: And Moses said unto Korah, Hear, I pray you, ye sons of Levi:

verses.latin_vulgate: num parum vobis est quod separavit vos Deus Israël ab omni populo, et junxit sibi, ut serviretis ei in cultu tabernaculi, et staretis coram frequentia populi, et ministraretis ei ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמְעַ֣ט מִכֶּ֗ם כִּֽי־הִבְדִּיל֩ אֱלֹהֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֤ל אֶתְכֶם֙ מֵעֲדַ֣ת יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לְהַקְרִ֥יב אֶתְכֶ֖ם אֵלָ֑יו לַעֲבֹ֗ד אֶת־עֲבֹדַת֙ מִשְׁכַּ֣ן יְהֹוָ֔ה וְלַעֲמֹ֛ד לִפְנֵ֥י הָעֵדָ֖ה לְשָׁרְתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Is it a small thing unto you, that the God of Israel hath spared you from all the people, and joined you to himself, that you should serve him in the service of the tabernacle, and should stand before the congregation of the people, and should minister to him?
verses.finnish_biblia: Vähäkö se teille on, että Israelin Jumala on teidät eroittanut Israelin kansasta ja antanut tulla tykönsä palvelusta tekemään Herran Tabernaklin virassa, ja seisomaan seurakunnan edessä, ja heitä palvelemaan?
verses.king_james: Seemeth it but a small thing unto you, that the God of Israel hath separated you from the congregation of Israel, to bring you near to himself to do the service of the tabernacle of the Lord, and to stand before the congregation to minister unto them?

verses.latin_vulgate: idcirco ad se fecit accedere te et omnes fratres tuos filios Levi, ut vobis etiam sacerdotium vindicetis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּקְרֵב֙ אֹֽתְךָ֔ וְאֶת־כׇּל־אַחֶ֥יךָ בְנֵי־לֵוִ֖י אִתָּ֑ךְ וּבִקַּשְׁתֶּ֖ם גַּם־כְּהֻנָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Did he therefore make thee and all thy brethren the sons of Levi to approach unto him, that you should challenge to yourselves the priesthood also,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on ottanut sinun ja kaikki sinun veljes Levin lapset tykönsä: ja te pyydätte myös pappeutta?
verses.king_james: And he hath brought thee near to him, and all thy brethren the sons of Levi with thee: and seek ye the priesthood also?

verses.latin_vulgate: et omnis globus tuus stet contra Dominum ? quid est enim Aaron ut murmuretis contra eum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן אַתָּה֙ וְכׇל־עֲדָ֣תְךָ֔ הַנֹּעָדִ֖ים עַל־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאַהֲרֹ֣ן מַה־ה֔וּא כִּ֥י (תלונו) [תַלִּ֖ינוּ] עָלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And that all thy company should stand against the Lord? for what is Aaron that you murmur against him?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä ja kaikki sinun joukkos nostatte kapinan Herraa vastaan. Mikä Aaron on, että te napisette häntä vastaan?
verses.king_james: For which cause both thou and all thy company are gathered together against the Lord: and what is Aaron, that ye murmur against him?

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit ergo Moyses ut vocaret Dathan et Abiron filios Eliab. Qui responderunt : Non venimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח מֹשֶׁ֔ה לִקְרֹ֛א לְדָתָ֥ן וְלַאֲבִירָ֖ם בְּנֵ֣י אֱלִיאָ֑ב וַיֹּאמְר֖וּ לֹ֥א נַעֲלֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Moses sent to call Dathan and Abiron the sons of Eliab. But they answered: We will not come.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses lähetti kutsumaan Datania ja Abiramia Eliabin poikia; mutta he sanoivat: emme sinne tule ylös.
verses.king_james: And Moses sent to call Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab: which said, We will not come up:

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid parum est tibi quod eduxisti nos de terra, quæ lacte et melle manabat, ut occideres in deserto, nisi et dominatus fueris nostri ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמְעַ֗ט כִּ֤י הֶֽעֱלִיתָ֙נוּ֙ מֵאֶ֨רֶץ זָבַ֤ת חָלָב֙ וּדְבַ֔שׁ לַהֲמִיתֵ֖נוּ בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר כִּֽי־תִשְׂתָּרֵ֥ר עָלֵ֖ינוּ גַּם־הִשְׂתָּרֵֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Is it a small matter to thee, that thou hast brought us out of a land that flowed with milk and honey, to kill us in the desert, except thou rule also like a lord over us?
verses.finnish_biblia: Vähäkö se on, että sinä olet meidät maalta tuonut ulos, jossa rieskaa ja hunajaa vuotaa, tappaakses meitä korvessa, vaan teet sinus vielä päämieheksi meidän ylitsemme, ja tahdot myös hallita meitä?
verses.king_james: Is it a small thing that thou hast brought us up out of a land that floweth with milk and honey, to kill us in the wilderness, except thou make thyself altogether a prince over us?

verses.latin_vulgate: Revera induxisti nos in terram, quæ fluit rivis lactis et mellis, et dedisti nobis possessiones agrorum et vinearum : an et oculos nostros vis eruere ? non venimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֡ף לֹ֣א אֶל־אֶ֩רֶץ֩ זָבַ֨ת חָלָ֤ב וּדְבַשׁ֙ הֲבִ֣יאֹתָ֔נוּ וַתִּ֨תֶּן־לָ֔נוּ נַחֲלַ֖ת שָׂדֶ֣ה וָכָ֑רֶם הַעֵינֵ֞י הָאֲנָשִׁ֥ים הָהֵ֛ם תְּנַקֵּ֖ר לֹ֥א נַעֲלֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast brought us indeed into a land that floweth with rivers of milk and honey, and hast given us possessions of fields and vineyards; wilt thou also pull out our eyes? We will not come.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jalosti sinä olet meidät johdattanut siihen maahan, jossa rieskaa ja hunajaa vuotaa, ja annoit pellot ja viinamäet perinnöksi. Tahdotkos vielä näiltä miehiltä silmät puhkaista? emme tule sinne.
verses.king_james: Moreover thou hast not brought us into a land that floweth with milk and honey, or given us inheritance of fields and vineyards: wilt thou put out the eyes of these men? we will not come up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iratusque Moyses valde, ait ad Dominum : Ne respicias sacrificia eorum : tu scis quod ne asellum quidem umquam acceperim ab eis, nec afflixerim quempiam eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֤חַר לְמֹשֶׁה֙ מְאֹ֔ד וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֔ה אַל־תֵּ֖פֶן אֶל־מִנְחָתָ֑ם לֹ֠א חֲמ֨וֹר אֶחָ֤ד מֵהֶם֙ נָשָׂ֔אתִי וְלֹ֥א הֲרֵעֹ֖תִי אֶת־אַחַ֥ד מֵהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses therefore being very angry, said to the Lord: Respect not their sacrifices: thou knowest that I have not taken of them so much as a young ass at any time, nor have injured any of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin vihastui Moses sangen kovin, ja sanoi Herralle: älä käännä sinuas heidän ruokauhrinsa puoleen! En minä heiltä ottanut aasiakaan, ja en ole heidän yhdenkään pahaa tehnyt.
verses.king_james: And Moses was very wroth, and said unto the Lord, Respect not thou their offering: I have not taken one ass from them, neither have I hurt one of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad Core : Tu, et omnis congregatio tua, state seorsum coram Domino, et Aaron die crastino separatim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר מֹשֶׁה֙ אֶל־קֹ֔רַח אַתָּה֙ וְכׇל־עֲדָ֣תְךָ֔ הֱי֖וּ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה אַתָּ֥ה וָהֵ֛ם וְאַהֲרֹ֖ן מָחָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to Core: Do thou and thy congregation stand apart before the Lord to morrow, and Aaron apart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi Koralle: sinä ja koko sinun joukkos pitää huomenna oleman Herran edessä, sinä ja he, ja Aaron,
verses.king_james: And Moses said unto Korah, Be thou and all thy company before the Lord, thou, and they, and Aaron, to morrow:

verses.latin_vulgate: Tollite singuli thuribula vestra, et ponite super ea incensum, offerentes Domino ducenta quinquaginta thuribula : Aaron quoque teneat thuribulum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּקְח֣וּ ׀ אִ֣ישׁ מַחְתָּת֗וֹ וּנְתַתֶּ֤ם עֲלֵיהֶם֙ קְטֹ֔רֶת וְהִקְרַבְתֶּ֞ם לִפְנֵ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ אִ֣ישׁ מַחְתָּת֔וֹ חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וּמָאתַ֖יִם מַחְתֹּ֑ת וְאַתָּ֥ה וְאַהֲרֹ֖ן אִ֥ישׁ מַחְתָּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take every one of you censers, and put incense upon them, offering to the Lord two hundred and fifty censers: let Aaron also hold his censer.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jokainen ottakoon savuastiansa, ja pankaan suitsutusta siihen, ja tuokaan Herran eteen, kukin savuastiansa, kaksisataa ja viisikymmentä savuastiaa, niin myös sinä ja Aaron kukin savuastianne.
verses.king_james: And take every man his censer, and put incense in them, and bring ye before the Lord every man his censer, two hundred and fifty censers; thou also, and Aaron, each of you his censer.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum fecissent, stantibus Moyses et Aaron,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְח֞וּ אִ֣ישׁ מַחְתָּת֗וֹ וַיִּתְּנ֤וּ עֲלֵיהֶם֙ אֵ֔שׁ וַיָּשִׂ֥ימוּ עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם קְטֹ֑רֶת וַֽיַּעַמְד֗וּ פֶּ֛תַח אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵ֖ד וּמֹשֶׁ֥ה וְאַהֲרֹֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: When they had done this, Moses and Aaron standing,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kukin otti savuastiansa, ja pani siihen tulen, ja heittivät siihen suitsutusta, ja seisoivat seurakunnan majan ovessa, Moses ja Aaron myös.
verses.king_james: And they took every man his censer, and put fire in them, and laid incense thereon, and stood in the door of the tabernacle of the congregation with Moses and Aaron.

verses.latin_vulgate: et coacervassent adversum eos omnem multitudinem ad ostium tabernaculi, apparuit cunctis gloria Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּקְהֵ֨ל עֲלֵיהֶ֥ם קֹ֙רַח֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הָ֣עֵדָ֔ה אֶל־פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד וַיֵּרָ֥א כְבוֹד־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־כׇּל־הָעֵדָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And had drawn up all the multitude against them to the door of the tabernacle, the glory of the Lord appeared to them all.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kora kokosi heitä vastaan kaiken kansan, seurakunnan majan oven eteen: silloin Herran kunnia näkyi kaikelle kansalle.
verses.king_james: And Korah gathered all the congregation against them unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation: and the glory of the Lord appeared unto all the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque Dominus ad Moysen et Aaron, ait :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה וְאֶֽל־אַהֲרֹ֖ן לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord speaking to Moses and Aaron, said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle ja Aaronille, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Separamini de medio congregationis hujus, ut eos repente disperdam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִבָּ֣דְל֔וּ מִתּ֖וֹךְ הָעֵדָ֣ה הַזֹּ֑את וַאֲכַלֶּ֥ה אֹתָ֖ם כְּרָֽגַע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may presently destroy them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eroittakaat teitänne tästä joukosta, niin minä äkisti heidät hukutan.
verses.king_james: Separate yourselves from among this congregation, that I may consume them in a moment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ceciderunt proni in faciem, atque dixerunt : Fortissime Deus spirituum universæ carnis, num uno peccante, contra omnes ira tua desæviet ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְּל֤וּ עַל־פְּנֵיהֶם֙ וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ אֵ֕ל אֱלֹהֵ֥י הָרוּחֹ֖ת לְכׇל־בָּשָׂ֑ר הָאִ֤ישׁ אֶחָד֙ יֶחֱטָ֔א וְעַ֥ל כׇּל־הָעֵדָ֖ה תִּקְצֹֽף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: They fell flat on their face, and said: O most mighty, the God of the spirits of all flesh, for one man's sin shall thy wrath rage against all?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he lankesivat kasvoillensa ja sanoivat: Jumala, kaiken lihan henkein Jumala! jos yksi mies on syntiä tehnyt, tahdotkos antaa vihas julmistua kaiken kansan päälle?
verses.king_james: And they fell upon their faces, and said, O God, the God of the spirits of all flesh, shall one man sin, and wilt thou be wroth with all the congregation?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Dominus ad Moysen :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcipe universo populo ut separetur a tabernaculis Core et Dathan et Abiron.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּבֵּ֥ר אֶל־הָעֵדָ֖ה לֵאמֹ֑ר הֵֽעָלוּ֙ מִסָּבִ֔יב לְמִשְׁכַּן־קֹ֖רַח דָּתָ֥ן וַאֲבִירָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Command the whole people to separate themselves from the tents of Core and Dathan and Abiron.
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhu kansalle ja sano: paetkaat Koran, Datanin ja Abiramin majain ympäriltä.
verses.king_james: Speak unto the congregation, saying, Get you up from about the tabernacle of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surrexitque Moyses, et abiit ad Dathan et Abiron : et sequentibus eum senioribus Israël,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֣קׇם מֹשֶׁ֔ה וַיֵּ֖לֶךְ אֶל־דָּתָ֣ן וַאֲבִירָ֑ם וַיֵּלְכ֥וּ אַחֲרָ֖יו זִקְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses arose, and went to Dathan and Abiron: and the ancients of Israel following him,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses nousi ja meni Datanin ja Abiramin tykö, ja vanhimmat Israelista seurasivat häntä,
verses.king_james: And Moses rose up and went unto Dathan and Abiram; and the elders of Israel followed him.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixit ad turbam : Recedite a tabernaculis hominum impiorum, et nolite tangere quæ ad eos pertinent, ne involvamini in peccatis eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֨ר אֶל־הָעֵדָ֜ה לֵאמֹ֗ר ס֣וּרוּ נָ֡א מֵעַל֩ אׇהֳלֵ֨י הָאֲנָשִׁ֤ים הָֽרְשָׁעִים֙ הָאֵ֔לֶּה וְאַֽל־תִּגְּע֖וּ בְּכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם פֶּן־תִּסָּפ֖וּ בְּכׇל־חַטֹּאתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He said to the multitude: Depart from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest you be involved in their sins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhui kansalle, sanoen: paetkaat näiden jumalattomain ihmisten majain ympäriltä, ja älkäät ruvetko mihinkään heidän omaansa, ettette myös hukkuisi kaikissa heidän synneissänsä.
verses.king_james: And he spake unto the congregation, saying, Depart, I pray you, from the tents of these wicked men, and touch nothing of theirs, lest ye be consumed in all their sins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque recessissent a tentoriis eorum per circuitum, Dathan et Abiron egressi stabant in introitu papilionum suorum cum uxoribus et liberis, omnique frequentia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּעָל֗וּ מֵעַ֧ל מִשְׁכַּן־קֹ֛רַח דָּתָ֥ן וַאֲבִירָ֖ם מִסָּבִ֑יב וְדָתָ֨ן וַאֲבִירָ֜ם יָצְא֣וּ נִצָּבִ֗ים פֶּ֚תַח אׇֽהֳלֵיהֶ֔ם וּנְשֵׁיהֶ֥ם וּבְנֵיהֶ֖ם וְטַפָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they were departed from their tents round about, Dathan and Abiron coming out stood in the entry of their pavilions with their wives and children, and all the people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he pakenivat Koran, Datanin ja Abiramin majain ympäriltä; mutta Datan ja Abiram kävivät ulos, ja seisoivat majainsa ovella emäntinensä, poikinensa ja lapsinensa.
verses.king_james: So they gat up from the tabernacle of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram, on every side: and Dathan and Abiram came out, and stood in the door of their tents, and their wives, and their sons, and their little children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Moyses : In hoc scietis quod Dominus miserit me ut facerem universa quæ cernitis, et non ex proprio ea corde protulerim :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֘אמֶר֮ מֹשֶׁה֒ בְּזֹאת֙ תֵּֽדְע֔וּן כִּֽי־יְהֹוָ֣ה שְׁלָחַ֔נִי לַעֲשׂ֕וֹת אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַֽמַּעֲשִׂ֖ים הָאֵ֑לֶּה כִּי־לֹ֖א מִלִּבִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses said: By this you shall know that the Lord hath sent me to do all things that you see, and that I have not forged them of my own head:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi: siitä teidän pitää tietämän Herran minua lähettäneeksi, kaikkia näitä töitä tekemään, niin ettei se ole minun omasta sydämestäni:
verses.king_james: And Moses said, Hereby ye shall know that the Lord hath sent me to do all these works; for I have not done them of mine own mind.

verses.latin_vulgate: si consueta hominum morte interierint, et visitaverit eos plaga, qua et ceteri visitari solent, non misit me Dominus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־כְּמ֤וֹת כׇּל־הָֽאָדָם֙ יְמֻת֣וּן אֵ֔לֶּה וּפְקֻדַּת֙ כׇּל־הָ֣אָדָ֔ם יִפָּקֵ֖ד עֲלֵיהֶ֑ם לֹ֥א יְהֹוָ֖ה שְׁלָחָֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: If these men die the common death of men, and if they be visited with a plague, wherewith others also are wont to be visited, the Lord did not send me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos he kuolevat niinkuin kaikki ihmiset kuolevat, eli kostetaan, niinkuin kaikille ihmisille kostetaan, niin ei Herra ole minua lähettänyt.
verses.king_james: If these men die the common death of all men, or if they be visited after the visitation of all men; then the Lord hath not sent me.

verses.latin_vulgate: sin autem novam rem fecerit Dominus, ut aperiens terra os suum deglutiat eos et omnia quæ ad illos pertinent, descenderintque viventes in infernum, scietis quod blasphemaverint Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־בְּרִיאָ֞ה יִבְרָ֣א יְהֹוָ֗ה וּפָצְתָ֨ה הָאֲדָמָ֤ה אֶת־פִּ֙יהָ֙ וּבָלְעָ֤ה אֹתָם֙ וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָהֶ֔ם וְיָרְד֥וּ חַיִּ֖ים שְׁאֹ֑לָה וִֽידַעְתֶּ֕ם כִּ֧י נִֽאֲצ֛וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if the Lord do a new thing, and the earth opening her mouth swallow them down, and all things that belong to them, and they go down alive into hell, you shall know that they have blasphemed the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jos Herra tässä jotakin uutta tekee, niin että maa avaa suunsa ja nielee heidät kaikkein kanssa, mitä heillä on, niin että he elävinä menevät helvettiin, niin teidän pitää tietämän, että nämät miehet pilkkasivat Herraa.
verses.king_james: But if the Lord make a new thing, and the earth open her mouth, and swallow them up, with all that appertain unto them, and they go down quick into the pit; then ye shall understand that these men have provoked the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confestim igitur ut cessavit loqui, dirupta est terra sub pedibus eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ כְּכַלֹּת֔וֹ לְדַבֵּ֕ר אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֖ים הָאֵ֑לֶּה וַתִּבָּקַ֥ע הָאֲדָמָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר תַּחְתֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And immediately as he had made an end of speaking, the earth broke asunder under their feet:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, koska hän kaikki nämät sanat puhunut oli, halkesi maa heidän altansa.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, as he had made an end of speaking all these words, that the ground clave asunder that was under them:

verses.latin_vulgate: et aperiens os suum, devoravit illos cum tabernaculis suis et universa substantia eorum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּפְתַּ֤ח הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ אֶת־פִּ֔יהָ וַתִּבְלַ֥ע אֹתָ֖ם וְאֶת־בָּתֵּיהֶ֑ם וְאֵ֤ת כׇּל־הָאָדָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְקֹ֔רַח וְאֵ֖ת כׇּל־הָרְכֽוּשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And opening her mouth, devoured them with their tents and all their substance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja maa avasi suunsa ja nieli heidät, ja heidän huoneensa, ja kaikki ne ihmiset, jotka Koran tykönä olivat, ja kaiken heidän tavaransa.
verses.king_james: And the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up, and their houses, and all the men that appertained unto Korah, and all their goods.

verses.latin_vulgate: descenderuntque vivi in infernum operti humo, et perierunt de medio multitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֨רְד֜וּ הֵ֣ם וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר לָהֶ֛ם חַיִּ֖ים שְׁאֹ֑לָה וַתְּכַ֤ס עֲלֵיהֶם֙ הָאָ֔רֶץ וַיֹּאבְד֖וּ מִתּ֥וֹךְ הַקָּהָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they went down alive into hell, the ground closing upon them, and they perished from among the people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he menivät elävänä helvettiin, kaikkinensa kuin heillä oli, ja maa peitti heidät, ja he hukkuivat kansan seasta.
verses.king_james: They, and all that appertained to them, went down alive into the pit, and the earth closed upon them: and they perished from among the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: At vero omnis Israël, qui stabat per gyrum, fugit ad clamorem pereuntium, dicens : Ne forte et nos terra deglutiat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אֲשֶׁ֛ר סְבִיבֹתֵיהֶ֖ם נָ֣סוּ לְקֹלָ֑ם כִּ֣י אָֽמְר֔וּ פֶּן־תִּבְלָעֵ֖נוּ הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But all Israel, that was standing round about, fled at the cry of them that were perishing: saying: Lest perhaps the earth swallow us up also.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koko Israel, joka heidän ympärillänsä oli, pakeni heidän parkunsa tähden. Sillä he sanoivat: ettei maa meitäkin nielisi.
verses.king_james: And all Israel that were round about them fled at the cry of them: for they said, Lest the earth swallow us up also.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et ignis egressus a Domino interfecit ducentos quinquaginta viros, qui offerebant incensum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֥שׁ יָצְאָ֖ה מֵאֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וַתֹּ֗אכַל אֵ֣ת הַחֲמִשִּׁ֤ים וּמָאתַ֙יִם֙ אִ֔ישׁ מַקְרִיבֵ֖י הַקְּטֹֽרֶת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And a fire coming out from the Lord, destroyed the two hundred and fifty men that offered the incense.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tuli läksi Herralta, ja poltti ne kaksisataa ja viisikymmentä miestä, jotka suitsutusta uhrasivat.
verses.king_james: And there came out a fire from the Lord, and consumed the two hundred and fifty men that offered incense.

verses.latin_vulgate: Locutusque est Dominus ad Moysen, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcipe Eleazaro filio Aaron sacerdoti ut tollat thuribula quæ jacent in incendio, et ignem huc illucque dispergat : quoniam sanctificata sunt
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱמֹ֨ר אֶל־אֶלְעָזָ֜ר בֶּן־אַהֲרֹ֣ן הַכֹּהֵ֗ן וְיָרֵ֤ם אֶת־הַמַּחְתֹּת֙ מִבֵּ֣ין הַשְּׂרֵפָ֔ה וְאֶת־הָאֵ֖שׁ זְרֵה־הָ֑לְאָה כִּ֖י קָדֵֽשׁוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Command Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest to take up the censers that lie in the burning, and to scatter the fire of one side and the other: because they are sanctified
verses.finnish_biblia: Sano Eleatsarille papin Aaronin pojalle, että hän ottaa savuastiat tulipalosta, ja hajoittaa tulen sinne ja tänne; sillä ne ovat pyhät.
verses.king_james: Speak unto Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest, that he take up the censers out of the burning, and scatter thou the fire yonder; for they are hallowed.

verses.latin_vulgate: in mortibus peccatorum : producatque ea in laminas, et affigat altari, eo quod oblatum sit in eis incensum Domino, et sanctificata sint, ut cernant ea pro signo et monimento filii Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֡ת מַחְתּוֹת֩ הַֽחַטָּאִ֨ים הָאֵ֜לֶּה בְּנַפְשֹׁתָ֗ם וְעָשׂ֨וּ אֹתָ֜ם רִקֻּעֵ֤י פַחִים֙ צִפּ֣וּי לַמִּזְבֵּ֔חַ כִּֽי־הִקְרִיבֻ֥ם לִפְנֵֽי־יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיִּקְדָּ֑שׁוּ וְיִֽהְי֥וּ לְא֖וֹת לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the deaths of the sinners: and let him beat them into plates, and fasten them to the altar, because incense hath been offered in them to the Lord, and they are sanctified, that the children of Israel may see them for a sign and a memorial.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näiden savuastiat, jotka syntiä tekivät sielujansa vastaan, ne takokaat leveiksi, ohukaisiksi kiskoiksi, joilla alttari peitetään; sillä ne ovat Herran eteen uhratut ja pyhitetyt. Ja ne pitää oleman merkiksi Israelin lapsille.
verses.king_james: The censers of these sinners against their own souls, let them make them broad plates for a covering of the altar: for they offered them before the Lord, therefore they are hallowed: and they shall be a sign unto the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tulit ergo Eleazar sacerdos thuribula ænea, in quibus obtulerant hi quos incendium devoravit, et produxit ea in laminas, affigens altari :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֞ח אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֗ן אֵ֚ת מַחְתּ֣וֹת הַנְּחֹ֔שֶׁת אֲשֶׁ֥ר הִקְרִ֖יבוּ הַשְּׂרֻפִ֑ים וַֽיְרַקְּע֖וּם צִפּ֥וּי לַמִּזְבֵּֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Eleazar the priest took the brazen censers, wherein they had offered, whom the burning fire had devoured, and beat them into plates, fastening them to the altar:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Eleatsar pappi otti ne vaskiastiat, joissa palaneet miehet olivat uhranneet, ja taotti ne leveiksi, ohukaisiksi kiskoiksi, alttarin peitteeksi,
verses.king_james: And Eleazar the priest took the brasen censers, wherewith they that were burnt had offered; and they were made broad plates for a covering of the altar:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut haberent postea filii Israël, quibus commonerentur ne quis accedat alienigena, et qui non est de semine Aaron ad offerendum incensum Domino, ne patiatur sicut passus est Core, et omnis congregatio ejus, loquente Domino ad Moysen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זִכָּר֞וֹן לִבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל לְ֠מַ֠עַן אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹֽא־יִקְרַ֜ב אִ֣ישׁ זָ֗ר אֲ֠שֶׁ֠ר לֹ֣א מִזֶּ֤רַע אַהֲרֹן֙ ה֔וּא לְהַקְטִ֥יר קְטֹ֖רֶת לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹֽא־יִהְיֶ֤ה כְקֹ֙רַח֙ וְכַ֣עֲדָת֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה בְּיַד־מֹשֶׁ֖ה לֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: That the children of Israel might have for the time to come wherewith they should be admonished, that no stranger or any one that is not of the seed of Aaron should come near to offer incense to the Lord, lest he should suffer as Core suffered, and all his congregation, according as the Lord spoke to Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin lapsille muistoksi, ettei yksikään muukalainen, joka ei ole Aaronin siemenestä, lähestyisi uhraamaan suitsutusta Herran eteen, ettei hänelle tapahtuisi, niinkuin Koralle ja hänen joukollensa, niinkuin Herra hänelle sanoi Moseksen kautta.
verses.king_james: To be a memorial unto the children of Israel, that no stranger, which is not of the seed of Aaron, come near to offer incense before the Lord; that he be not as Korah, and as his company: as the Lord said to him by the hand of Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Murmuravit autem omnis multitudo filiorum Israël sequenti die contra Moysen et Aaron, dicens : Vos interfecistis populum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּלֹּ֜נוּ כׇּל־עֲדַ֤ת בְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מִֽמׇּחֳרָ֔ת עַל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה וְעַֽל־אַהֲרֹ֖ן לֵאמֹ֑ר אַתֶּ֥ם הֲמִתֶּ֖ם אֶת־עַ֥ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The following day all the multitude of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and Aaron, saying: You have killed the people of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toisena päivänä taas napisivat koko Israelin lasten joukko Mosesta ja Aaronia vastaan, ja sanoivat: te olette tappaneet Herran kansan.
verses.king_james: But on the morrow all the congregation of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and against Aaron, saying, Ye have killed the people of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque oriretur seditio, et tumultus incresceret,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י בְּהִקָּהֵ֤ל הָֽעֵדָה֙ עַל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה וְעַֽל־אַהֲרֹ֔ן וַיִּפְנוּ֙ אֶל־אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֔ד וְהִנֵּ֥ה כִסָּ֖הוּ הֶעָנָ֑ן וַיֵּרָ֖א כְּב֥וֹד יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when there arose a sedition, and the tumult increased,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koska kansa kokoontui Mosesta ja Aaronia vastaan, ja kuin he käänsivät heitänsä seurakunnan majaan päin, katso, pilvi peitti sen ja Herran kunnia näkyi.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, when the congregation was gathered against Moses and against Aaron, that they looked toward the tabernacle of the congregation: and, behold, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the Lord appeared.

verses.latin_vulgate: Moyses et Aaron fugerunt ad tabernaculum fœderis. Quod, postquam ingressi sunt, operuit nubes, et apparuit gloria Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤א מֹשֶׁה֙ וְאַהֲרֹ֔ן אֶל־פְּנֵ֖י אֹ֥הֶל מוֹעֵֽד׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moses and Aaron fled to the tabernacle of the covenant. And when they were gone into it, the cloud covered it, and the glory of the Lord appeared.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses ja Aaron menivät seurakunnan majan eteen.
verses.king_james: And Moses and Aaron came before the tabernacle of the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad Moysen :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Moses:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Recedite de medio hujus multitudinis, etiam nunc delebo eos. Cumque jacerent in terra,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵרֹ֗מּוּ מִתּוֹךְ֙ הָעֵדָ֣ה הַזֹּ֔את וַאֲכַלֶּ֥ה אֹתָ֖ם כְּרָ֑גַע וַֽיִּפְּל֖וּ עַל־פְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Get you out from the midst of this multitude, this moment will I destroy them. And as they were lying on the ground,
verses.finnish_biblia: Paetkaat tästä kansasta; sillä minä surmaan äkisti heidät, ja he lankesivat kasvoillensa.
verses.king_james: Get you up from among this congregation, that I may consume them as in a moment. And they fell upon their faces.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixit Moyses ad Aaron : Tolle thuribulum, et hausto igne de altari, mitte incensum desuper, pergens cito ad populum, ut roges pro eis : jam enim egressa est ira a Domino, et plaga desævit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֜ה אֶֽל־אַהֲרֹ֗ן קַ֣ח אֶת־הַ֠מַּחְתָּ֠ה וְתֶן־עָלֶ֨יהָ אֵ֜שׁ מֵעַ֤ל הַמִּזְבֵּ֙חַ֙ וְשִׂ֣ים קְטֹ֔רֶת וְהוֹלֵ֧ךְ מְהֵרָ֛ה אֶל־הָעֵדָ֖ה וְכַפֵּ֣ר עֲלֵיהֶ֑ם כִּֽי־יָצָ֥א הַקֶּ֛צֶף מִלִּפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה הֵחֵ֥ל הַנָּֽגֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses said to Aaron: Take the censer, and putting fire in it from the altar, put incense upon it, and go quickly to the people to pray for them: for already wrath is gone out from the Lord, and the plague rageth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi Aaronille: ota savuastia, ja pane tulta siihen alttarilta, ja heitä suitsutusta siihen. Ja mene nopiasti kansan tykö ja sovita heitä: sillä vihan julmuus on Herralta käynyt ulos, ja rangaistus on jo alkanut.
verses.king_james: And Moses said unto Aaron, Take a censer, and put fire therein from off the altar, and put on incense, and go quickly unto the congregation, and make an atonement for them: for there is wrath gone out from the Lord; the plague is begun.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod cum fecisset Aaron, et cucurrisset ad mediam multitudinem, quam jam vastabat incendium, obtulit thymiama :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקַּ֨ח אַהֲרֹ֜ן כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר ׀ דִּבֶּ֣ר מֹשֶׁ֗ה וַיָּ֙רׇץ֙ אֶל־תּ֣וֹךְ הַקָּהָ֔ל וְהִנֵּ֛ה הֵחֵ֥ל הַנֶּ֖גֶף בָּעָ֑ם וַיִּתֵּן֙ אֶֽת־הַקְּטֹ֔רֶת וַיְכַפֵּ֖ר עַל־הָעָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: When Aaron had done this, and had run to the midst of the multitude which the burning fire was now destroying, he offered the incense:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Aaron otti niinkuin Moses hänelle sanoi, ja juoksi kansan keskelle, ja katso, rangaistus oli jo ruvennut kansan seassa: ja hän suitsutti savutusta, ja sovitti kansan.
verses.king_james: And Aaron took as Moses commanded, and ran into the midst of the congregation; and, behold, the plague was begun among the people: and he put on incense, and made an atonement for the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: et stans inter mortuos ac viventes, pro populo deprecatus est, et plaga cessavit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמֹ֥ד בֵּֽין־הַמֵּתִ֖ים וּבֵ֣ין הַֽחַיִּ֑ים וַתֵּעָצַ֖ר הַמַּגֵּפָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And standing between the dead and the living, he prayed for the people, and the plague ceased.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja seisoi kuolleitten ja elävitten välillä; niin rangaistus asettui.
verses.king_james: And he stood between the dead and the living; and the plague was stayed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuerunt autem qui percussi sunt, quatuordecim millia hominum, et septingenti, absque his qui perierant in seditione Core.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֗וּ הַמֵּתִים֙ בַּמַּגֵּפָ֔ה אַרְבָּעָ֥ה עָשָׂ֛ר אֶ֖לֶף וּשְׁבַ֣ע מֵא֑וֹת מִלְּבַ֥ד הַמֵּתִ֖ים עַל־דְּבַר־קֹֽרַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the number of them that were slain was fourteen thousand and seven hundred men, besides them that had perished in the sedition of Core.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ne kuin rangaistuksesta kuolivat, oli neljätoistakymmentä tuhatta ja seitsemänsataa; paitsi niitä, jotka Koran kapinassa hukkuivat.
verses.king_james: Now they that died in the plague were fourteen thousand and seven hundred, beside them that died about the matter of Korah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque est Aaron ad Moysen ad ostium tabernaculi fœderis postquam quievit interitus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שׇׁב אַהֲרֹן֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֶל־פֶּ֖תַח אֹ֣הֶל מוֹעֵ֑ד וְהַמַּגֵּפָ֖ה נֶעֱצָֽרָה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Aaron returned to Moses to the door of the tabernacle of the covenant after the destruction was over.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Aaron palasi Moseksen tykö, seurakunnan majan oveen ja rangaistus asettui.
verses.king_james: And Aaron returned unto Moses unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation: and the plague was stayed.
